text: I feel a sense of curiosity and mild excitement being here, as though I've stepped into a place dedicated to the interplay between knowledge and invention. The clean, modern design stirs thoughtful appreciation for human creativity. The glass and the colors evoke a space for discovery, inviting me to ponder how research and development shape our experience and understanding of the world. I feel welcomed but also slightly detached, as if standing at the threshold between observation and participation.
